verses.1: Then Jonah prayed to the LORD, his God, out of the fish’s belly.
verses.3: For you threw me into the depths,
verses.4: I said, ‘I have been banished from your sight;
verses.6: I went down to the bottoms of the mountains.
verses.7: “When my soul fainted within me, I remembered the LORD.
verses.8: Those who regard vain idols forsake their own mercy.
verses.9: But I will sacrifice to you with the voice of thanksgiving.
verses.10: Then the LORD spoke to the fish, and it vomited out Jonah on the dry land.
